issues.description: Condition should be 'Always', not 'HasRestingDon'. The card ability triggers on block without requiring don. The '[DON!! x1]' notation indicates a cost requirement, not a conditional trigger—this should be represented as a cost field, not a condition. Current DSL incorrectly gates the effect behind a don requirement.
Missing 'cost' field. '[DON!! x1]' is a cost requirement that must be paid to use this effect, separate from the trigger condition.
